betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Trinitite§f:
Trinitite (trinity:trinitite) is a glassy, greenish residue formed when sand or soil is subjected to the intense heat of a nuclear detonation. It is named after the Trinity test site in New Mexico where the first nuclear weapon was detonated in 1945.

§6Production Source§f:
Trinitite is produced in two ways:
- §bExplosive Production§f: when a Trinity bomb detonates, the surrounding sand is converted into Trinitite-covered Sand (a block variant). Breaking this block yields Trinitite Shards.
- §bLiquid Production§f: contaminated_water fluid + 666 mB → trinity:trinitite_shard × 1 (CraftTweaker, nuclearcraftTweaks.zs:46)

§6Crafting Recipes§f:
- §bBlock of Trinitite§f (TrinityRecipes.java:67): pattern "TTT / TTT / TTT" with T = trinity:trinitite, yields 1 solid_trinitite block
- §bTrinitite Shard§f recovery: from Trinitite-covered Sand (dropped by the block) or from contaminated_water via the Crystallizer

§6What Trinitite Is Used For§f:
Trinitite is a radioactive, decorative, and utility item:
- §bDecoration§f: greenish glass-like blocks for building radioactive monuments
- §bBaratol Component§f: trinity:solid_baratol (a powerful explosive) is made from Trinitite + TNT + Lead
- §bContamination Source§f: Trinitite emits low-level radiation. Walking on Trinitite-covered Sand or breaking Trinitite blocks exposes you to radiation damage over time.
- §bCrafting Material§f: used in advanced radiation shielding and exotic recipes

§6Trinitite Radiation (TooltipHandler)§f:
Trinitite has a built-in radiation source. Standing on or near Trinitite blocks increases your radiation level. The exact rate depends on the TrinityConfig.radiation_rate setting.

§6Direct Descendants of Trinitite Shard (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 2 items used in the shard's crafting or processing:
- trinity:trinitite (the source block)
- dustPetrotheum (thermalfoundation, a Thermal Series dust used to convert sand to trinitite-like material)

§6Solid Trinitite Block Recipe (TrinityRecipes.java:67)§f:
Pattern "TTT / TTT / TTT" with T = trinity:trinitite. Yields 1 trinity:solid_trinitite per craft. The solid block is decorative and emits a slightly stronger radiation aura than the loose shard.

§6Why It Matters§f:
Trinitite is the canonical "you've been near a nuclear explosion" indicator in the modpack. After a Trinity bomb test, the surrounding landscape will be covered in Trinitite, marking the test site permanently. It also serves as a key crafting reagent for advanced explosives and shielding.

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30056 (Thermonuclear Bomb) — Trinitite is most efficiently produced as a byproduct of nuclear detonations.

§eTip§f: After a Trinity bomb test, mine the Trinitite-covered Sand with a Silk Touch tool to collect it efficiently. The solid trinitite block is a great decoration for your nuclear facility.

§eTip§f: Use Trinitite + Lead to craft Baratol, a key ingredient in Compression Charges. This creates a self-sustaining weapons production chain.

§cWarning§f: Trinitite is radioactive. Avoid walking on it without radiation shielding. Mining Trinitite shards exposes you to high radiation levels — use a Mining Rig with a Rad-Shielded Container.
